embeddings module

src.embeddings.encode_texts(model, texts)[source]

Generate embeddings for a list of texts.

Parameters:

  • model (SentenceTransformer) – Preloaded embedding model.

  • texts (list[str]) – List of text inputs to encode.

Returns:

Array of embeddings representing the texts.

Return type:

numpy.ndarray

Example:

from src.embeddings import encode_texts

embeddings = encode_texts(model, ["Example ticket"])
src.embeddings.load_embedding_model()[source]

Load a sentence embedding model.

This function initializes and returns a pre-trained sentence transformer model for generating text embeddings. The model is configured to run on CPU to ensure compatibility across different environments.

Returns:

Loaded embedding model configured for CPU usage.

Return type:

SentenceTransformer

Example:

from src.embeddings import load_embedding_model

model = load_embedding_model()
